sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77777" key="parabate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρα-βᾰτέον</orth>, <sense id="n77777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must overstep, go beyond</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐ π. τὰ καλῶς ἔχοντα</foreign> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg005.perseus-grc1:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
